Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in as ph.marcom@flowlink.demo
2. Open /performance/offers/library
3. On approved offer (e.g. after Submit for review → Approve on o1000005 or published promo draft), click Activate now
Expected Result: Offer status becomes Active with success toast
Actual Result: Spinner on lifecycle button never clears; status stays unchanged
Resolution Notes: Root cause: offers table lacked RLS write policy for MarCom module edit; lifecycle UI had no busy/finally guard. Fix: migration 20260715120000 (offers_studio_write + fn_offer_set_status guard) + OffersAdmin statusBusy handling.
